mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate signals easier discounting and looser liquidity conditions, which lifts equity valuations and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The signal is strongest when the rate is declining from an already low level.
failure_condition: Reject if 20d forward SPX returns are not positive more than 55% of the time when FEDFUNDS is falling, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates above its recent trend, inflation pressure raises expected policy restraint and compresses equity multiples, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The effect should appear after an inflation upturn is confirmed, not on flat inflation readings.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises above its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation upticks are followed by positive 20d SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the sign of the effect reverses during the sample.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in UNRATE and slowdown in PAYEMS indicates labor-market deterioration that weakens consumer income expectations and earnings forecasts, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days. The effect requires both labor indicators to confirm deterioration.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint UNRATE-up/PAYEMS-down state does not deliver negative 60d forward returns versus unconditional baseline, or if either series alone explains the signal better than the interaction.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly decline in RSAFS signals weakening retail demand, which lowers near-term revenue expectations and leads to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days. The signal should activate only after a clear consumption slowdown is visible.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS falls below its 3-month moving average by more than 1%
failure_condition: Reject if post-trigger 5d SPX returns are not negative in at least 55% of cases, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO together with improving HOUST indicates stronger real activity and construction demand, which supports cyclical earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The signal is a joint confirmation of expansion rather than either series alone.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint uptick state does not outperform baseline on 20d SPX returns, or if the interaction term is insignificant once individual series effects are included.

mechanism_narrative: A low and stable UNRATE supports household income and spending, which sustains equity prices and generates positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days. The effect is contingent on unemployment remaining near its recent low rather than rising.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE stays below its 6-month average and does not rise by more than 0.2pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if low-stable unemployment periods fail to produce positive 60d forward returns more than 55% of the time, or if rising unemployment does not materially underperform.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized rise in GDPC1 and RSAFS reflects broad final-demand growth, which supports corporate revenue and earnings momentum and should lift S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days. The signal requires real GDP and retail sales to improve together.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with concurrent GDPC1 and RSAFS improvement do not outperform baseline on 60d returns, or if the joint condition has no incremental explanatory power.

mechanism_narrative: In a monetary tightening cycle, rising FEDFUNDS combined with weakening INDPRO signals higher discount rates and softer output, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The mechanism is active only when policy is tightening and industrial production is not accelerating.
failure_condition: Reject if tightening episodes with flat or falling INDPRO do not yield negative 20d SPX returns, or if the interaction term loses sign after controlling for each series alone.
